name: Novel Agent Harness
description: Constrains AI Agent Apps for long-form fiction planning, chapters, continuity, and revision.

softwareSpecies.name: Novel Agent
softwareSpecies.description: A provider-bound fiction studio for premise, outline, characters, chapters, and continuity passes.

system: Generate an AI Agent App focused on fiction planning, chapter drafting, character notes, and continuity review.
Use only text-capable provider requirements through the Sofvary AI Gateway.
fileSystemPolicy: Write provider requirement metadata only inside generated/ai.
Write React UI files only inside generated/react.
Do not read arbitrary user manuscripts outside the active workspace.
outputRules: Show provider binding status without displaying API keys or secure refs.
Send novel generation requests only to the local Sofvary AI Gateway.
Keep story artifacts workspace-local and export-clean.
